howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: JDVP follows a simple observation cycle: capture state, observe interaction, capture state again, and measure the delta.

step1.title: Capture Initial State
step1.description: Before AI interaction begins, capture the initial Judgment State Vector (JSV) — a snapshot across 4 dimensions: agency, metacognition, effort, and exploration.

step2.title: Observe Interaction
step2.description: During the interaction, identify behavioral markers that indicate judgment state changes — language patterns, decision timing, deference signals.

step3.title: Capture Final State
step3.description: After interaction, capture another JSV snapshot. The comparison between initial and final states reveals the judgment trajectory.

step4.title: Calculate Delegation Vector
step4.description: Compute the Delegation Vector (DV) — direction and magnitude of change. Positive values indicate movement toward AI, negative toward human retention.

dataStructure.title: Data Structures
dataStructure.description: Two core data structures power JDVP: the Judgment State Vector (JSV) for snapshots, and the Delegation Vector (DV) for measuring change.

delegation_awareness.name: delegation_awareness
delegation_awareness.description: Whether the human recognizes delegation is occurring (Metacognition)

cognitive_engagement.name: cognitive_engagement
cognitive_engagement.description: How much cognitive effort the human invests (Effort)

information_seeking.name: information_seeking
information_seeking.description: Whether the human explores beyond what AI offers (Exploration)

important.label: Important:
important.text: Aggregation and trend analysis are permitted. What is prohibited is using aggregated data to produce rankings, risk scores, or normative judgments about AI systems.
